meta.title: Indicator
meta.description: Visual signal that surfaces ongoing progress while data loads or a user action runs — Spinner and Progress Bar.

hero.title: Indicator
hero.desc: Indicator signals that work is in progress — while data loads, or while a user-triggered action is being processed.

components.title: Components
components.desc: Indicator splits by how the duration behaves — Spinner for indeterminate timing, Progress Bar for determinate timing.
components.caption:
A. Spinner
B. Progress Bar

spinner.title: Spinner
spinner.desc: Used when data loading or processing takes an unpredictable amount of time — visualizes the work indeterminately.

type.title: Type
type.desc: Spinner splits by scope — embedded within a Button or Dropdown, and applied at the Container or Page level.

duration.title: Duration
duration.desc: As an indeterminate Indicator, Spinner is typically used for short loading windows around 1-3 seconds.

items.title: Button
items.desc: Surfaces when a Button action triggers data loading.

items.title: Dropdown
items.desc: Surfaces when a Dropdown action triggers data loading.

progressBar.title: Progress Bar
progressBar.desc: Used when the processing time is predictable — visualizes the work determinately.
progressBar.caption: Progress Bar (Linear Type)

state.title: State
state.desc: Progress Bar surfaces determinate progress information. In Wind, it's primarily used during file upload. It carries two states — Uploading and Complete.

size.title: Size
size.desc: When embedded in a Wind container, Progress Bar's Height equals the container's Height. Width flexes to the surrounding area.

exportPdf.title: Export PDF
exportPdf.desc: Wind uses Progress Bar when exporting files. Typically pairs with Spinner.
